text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's past our usual time for training, but Daiwa
Scarlet still hasn't shown up. I decide to wait, and
just as it's getting dark...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Have you... been waiting for me here this whole
time?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I can't believe you sometimes... But, um... sorry.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
This is all because the doctor told me I needed to
get some rest. Can you believe that? I'm not even
tired!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I said I was fine, but that just started an
argument, and before I knew it, the sun was going
down...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
We can totally start training now, though! I don't
have time to waste if I'm going to become number
one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, it does seem like Daiwa
Scarlet has been overexerting herself lately.
choice_data_list: You don't have to push yourself.
You don't have to push yourself.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
choice_data_list: Just think of it as a challenge!
Just think of it as a challenge!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! Honestly, if you were any more laid-back,
you'd fall over!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Sigh... But I guess you're right. I don't want to end up too tired to train.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet seems to have seen the error of her
ways.
